_comment: 凭证清单. 月度 credential-rotation-reminder.yml 读此文件检查 age. PL 轮换凭证后改 created_at 为今天日期.

credentials.name: Aliyun RAM AccessKey (acme-dns-bot)
credentials.purpose: acme.sh 调阿里云 DNS API 加 TXT 记录, Let's Encrypt cert 90 天自动续期 (DNS-01 challenge)
credentials.rotation_steps: 阿里云 RAM 控制台 → acme-dns-bot → AccessKey 管理 → 创建新 → ECS 上 export Ali_Key + Ali_Secret 重跑 setup-ssl-acme-aliyun.sh → 删旧

credentials.name: GitHub PAT (TORTOISE_WEB_TOKEN)
credentials.purpose: Tortoise 主仓 docs-dispatch.yml 跨仓 dispatch + push tortoise-docs
credentials.rotation_steps: GitHub Settings → Developer → PATs → 生新 (scopes: repo + workflow) → Tortoise 主仓 Settings → Secrets → TORTOISE_WEB_TOKEN 粘新值 → 删旧 PAT

credentials.name: Aliyun ECS SSH key (github-actions-deploy-v2)
credentials.purpose: GitHub Actions deploy.yml 通过 appleboy/scp-action SSH 进 ECS 跑 rsync 部署
credentials.rotation_steps: ECS 上 ssh-keygen 生新 keypair → 公钥加 ~/.ssh/authorized_keys → 私钥粘 GitHub Secret ALIYUN_SSH_KEY → 删 authorized_keys 旧公钥
